commands.name: Open Activity Monitor
commands.description: Launch Activity Monitor to inspect CPU, memory, and process usage

commands.name: Check Disk Usage
commands.description: Show disk usage for all mounted volumes in Terminal

commands.name: Kill Port 3000
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9"'
commands.description: Force kill any process running on port 3000

commands.name: Kill Port 8080
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "lsof -ti:8080 | xargs kill -9"'
commands.description: Force kill any process running on port 8080

commands.name: Top Processes
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "top -o cpu -n 10"'
commands.description: Show the top 10 CPU-consuming processes in Terminal
